description: Older model has weak context notes high category compression and little evidence alignment
Useful comparison tool but may imply false precision if criteria and weights are hidden
Reusable scaffold needs context preservation evidence status and retirement rules to avoid spreading stale assumptions
Improves consistency but may become formulaic when used without section judgment
Clarifies feedback and dependencies but needs agency responsibility and boundary notes
Supports claims evidence values tradeoffs and accountability when participation limits are explicit
